3.0.5.title: .env Editor
3.0.5.description: Added a secure, permission-gated .env editor to the admin topbar so server configuration can be changed without SSH or FTP access.

features.title: Edit .env Button
features.description: New topbar icon visible only to Administrators, opening a password-confirmed editor for the application's .env file.

features.title: Password Re-Confirmation
features.description: Requires re-entering the account password before the editor opens, reusing Laravel's standard password-confirmation session window.

features.title: Direct File Read/Write
features.description: Loads the current .env contents on open and writes changes straight back to disk, with clear error handling if the file isn't writable.

3.0.4.title: Cache Management Widget
3.0.4.description: Added a quick cache-clear and optimize button to the admin topbar, plus a new player level distribution chart on the dashboard.

features.title: Clear Cache Button
features.description: Topbar button with confirmation modal to clear application, config, view, and route caches without leaving the page.

features.title: Optimize Button
features.description: Runs php artisan optimize directly from the same modal to cache the app for production.

features.title: Player Level Distribution Widget
features.description: Dashboard bar chart showing character counts grouped by 10-level ranges, using the configured level cap or the highest character level.

3.0.3.title: updated composer.lock and added version numbers to package composer.json files
3.0.3.description: Updated composer.lock with latest package versions and added explicit version numbers to each package's composer.json for better clarity and dependency management.

3.0.2.title: VSRO Compatibility & Item Name Translation
3.0.2.description: Full VSRO server support for Monster Drops — no more SQL errors, item names now resolved via _ItemNameDesc just like the Items page.

features.title: VSRO SQL Fix
features.description: Removed cross-database join to SILKROAD_R_ACCOUNT.dbo._Rigid_ItemNameDesc which does not exist on VSRO servers.

features.title: Item Name Translation on VSRO
features.description: Drop table item names are now resolved via _ItemNameDesc (same source as the Items page), showing real English names instead of CodeName128.

features.title: Monster Name Fallback
features.description: Monster display names fall back to CodeName128 on VSRO since _ItemNameDesc does not contain monster name entries.

3.0.1.title: Monster Drops & Item Detail Fixes
3.0.1.description: Drop system overhaul with correct tiered pool support, improved monster drop statistics, and fixed gender display on item detail pages.

features.title: Tiered Drop Pools
features.description: Monster drops now correctly load from _RefDropItemAssign (potions, elixirs, scrolls, alchemy) in addition to named item groups.

features.title: Drop Statistics Overview
features.description: Replaced Notable Monsters with a drop system breakdown showing named pools, tiered pools, and monster assignment stats.

features.title: Item Gender Fix
features.description: Fixed gender display on item detail pages — correct Female/Male mapping with matching pink/blue colors.

3.0.0.title: World Map, Tickets & Referrals
3.0.0.description: Major release with interactive world map, support ticket system, referral rewards, and a revamped dashboard.

features.title: Interactive World Map
features.description: Displays online player positions in real time.

features.title: Support Ticket System
features.description: Categories, priority levels, and admin replies.

features.title: Referral System
features.description: Configurable validation and automatic Silk distribution.

features.title: Revamped Dashboard
features.description: Silk balance, character info, and event timers.

features.title: Silkroad Gaming Theme
features.description: New theme with light/dark toggle and BBCode editor.

2.0.0.title: Templates, Payments & Localization
2.0.0.description: Complete template architecture, 8-language support, and multiple payment provider integrations.

features.title: Template System
features.description: Modular theme architecture with a bundled basic theme.

features.title: 8 Languages
features.description: Arabic, German, English, Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese, Turkish.

features.title: Donations & Payments
features.description: Fawaterk, Maxicard, and other payment providers.

features.title: Voting Plugin
features.description: Integrated voting with reward distribution.

features.title: Page Management
features.description: Translatable pages and guild & inventory features.

1.0.0.title: Initial Release
1.0.0.description: Modern foundation for managing Silkroad web projects with a clean, modular architecture.

features.title: Web Installer
features.description: Streamlined setup wizard for new installations.

features.title: Modular Package System
features.description: Extend functionality via installable packages.

features.title: Developer-Friendly
features.description: Clean, maintainable codebase built on Laravel.
